title: 1 killed, 23 injured after minibus overturns in Idukki
content: A woman was killed and 23 others were injured after a mini bus carrying tourists overturned at Anayirankal in Pooppara here on Thursday. The deceased was identified as Stella Mary (58), a native of Virudhunagar in Tamil Nadu. The accident occurred around 4 pm. The 28-member tourist group- consisting of 18 women, four men and six children- from Virudhunagar and Aruppukottai was returning after visiting Munnar. According to reports, the driver lost control of the vehicle while taking a curve. The bus crashed through a culvert and plunged more than 50 feet into a tea plantation below. Local residents and passengers from other vehicles joined the rescue efforts and pulled out those trapped inside the bus. Rescue workers said Stella Mary had sustained serious head injuries. She was rushed to Tata Highrange Hospital in Munnar but succumbed to her injuries. The remaining 23 injured passengers are undergoing treatment at the hospital, while six seriously injured persons were shifted to Theni Medical College Hospital for advanced treatment.
